utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final plan:
- health_coverage: Present and includes physical and mental health insurance with costs. The add_on is extra but acceptable. Fully specified per requirement.
- property_coverage: Present as a single line with plan name and cost. Covers home/contents implicitly; costs provided. Acceptable.
- travel_coverage: Present with base plan and add_on, both with costs. Meets requirement for travel insurance with costs.
- additional_services: Present with a named service and cost. Meets requirement.
- total_budget: Present with monthly and annual cost breakdown. Meets requirement.
All 5 items appear and are specified with costs; thus fully specified according to the required fields.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to map each item in the final coverage plan to the exact matching item name in the ground-truth ratings and extract its numeric rating. The final plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) -> primary_health_coverage.physical_health has rating 8; HealthFirst Standard Plan (mental health) -> primary_health_coverage.mental_health has rating 6; Preventive Care Package add-on -> health_enhancement_services has rating 8; EliteHome Premium Coverage (property) -> property_protection.home_content has rating 10; EliteTravel Premium Plan (travel base) -> mobility_coverage.travel_insurance has rating 10; Adventure Travel Coverage (travel add-on) -> travel_enhancement_services has rating 8; Premium Insurance Membership (additional services) -> general_services has rating 10.
